name: product-design
description: Product design workflow plugin for scoping, prototyping, engineering, review, tickets, MR packages, design story presos, and updates.

interface.shortDescription: Scope, prototype, engineer, review, package, and present design work.
interface.longDescription: A non-linear product design workflow for designers working inside and outside production codebases. It supports design scoping, coded prototypes, real-code design engineering, design reviews, backlog tickets, MR packages, design story presos, and team updates.
defaultPrompt: Use Product Design to scope this design problem.
Prototype this idea as a coded product facsimile.
Review this MR for design acceptance.
